title: T6 Constellation: name-collision sweep, all apps
prompt: Close the invisibility class six-app-eval named its single worst finding: new constellation apps losing natural-language resolution to older skills that share their trigger vocabulary (two instances found and fixed 2026-07-04 in appydave-plugins commit 0754317 — omi-fetch and apps-registry; ~38 apps never checked). Sweep all apps in ~/dev/ad/apps/dark-factory/mochaccino/data/constellation.json (40 at authoring) against every David-owned skill source (appydave-plugins dev repo: appydave/brand-dave/flivideo skills, excluding _archived/; plus ~/.claude/skills) via a mechanical name/token prefilter (self-test: it MUST surface the two known pairs) followed by a judgment pass classifying each candidate pair as collision / intentional-pair / benign / ambiguous. Write the full per-app matrix + confirmed-collision fix plans + invisible-by-absence list (report-only, create NO new skills) to docs/name-collision-sweep-<UTC date>.md in dark-factory. Apply the proven additive bidirectional-pointer fix (description routing sentence + 'Related app' body section + README back-pointer; nothing renamed or deleted) to at most 5 new confirmed collisions, deferring any overflow in the report. Then propagate: authoring-time recon found the 2026-07-04 fixes exist only in the dev repo at plugin v6.1.0 while the live cache runs v5.9.1 WITHOUT them — bump the edited plugin's patch version and run appydave-plugins/reload-plugins.sh so all pointer fixes (old and new) are actually live in ~/.claude/plugins/cache + installed_plugins.json. Commit and push both repos (appydave-plugins: skill edits + version bump; dark-factory: the report). Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T6-01-name-collision-sweep.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: In ~/dev/ad/apps/dark-factory: exactly one docs/name-collision-sweep-*.md exists with one table row per constellation.json app (>= the app count, 40 at authoring), rows for the omi-fetch and app-registry pairs citing commit 0754317, an invisible-by-absence list, and an '## Outcome' section whose counts match the table. Propagation closed: installed_plugins.json's appydave@appydave-plugins version equals appydave/.claude-plugin/plugin.json's version, and grep 'Related app' returns >=1 in the CACHE copies of omi-fetch/SKILL.md and apps-registry/SKILL.md under that version (plus every newly fixed skill, in both dev repo and cache). Negative: no skill directory deleted, renamed, or newly created in appydave-plugins; _archived/appydave-skills/skills-registry untouched; no edits under ~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/; dark-factory research/ untouched; at most 5 new collision fixes applied with any overflow marked collision-deferred in the report. Both repos committed and pushed clean of the ticket's own files.
